title: A delegated subagent's frame is closed before the run ends
description: Given a prompt that makes the agent delegate, every avp.subagent_invoked must be paired with an avp.subagent_returned carrying the same span_id, emitted before agent_stopped. This is the async-dispatch trap: runtimes whose subagent tool returns a launch receipt immediately (the child reports later, out of band) will close the tool span while the child is still running, and a parent that stops first leaves the frame dangling. The universal structure check enforces the pairing and the converged/abandoned consistency; this case exists to actually drive a delegation so that check has something to bite on. Model-agnostic: no assertion on what the subagent found, only that its frame opened and closed.

commission.prompt: Delegate to a subagent: ask it to reply with exactly the word PONG. Wait for the subagent to report back, then tell me the single word it replied with and nothing else.

events.label: run closes after the subagent frame

forbidden_events.label: the run must not claim convergence while a subagent was abandoned
